repairs.name: ImportRewriteOperator
repairs.description: Rewrites broken or malformed import statements to their canonical form

repairs.name: HeaderInjectionOperator
repairs.description: Injects canonical governance header blocks into modules missing them

repairs.name: DependencyNormalizerOperator
repairs.description: Normalizes inconsistent, circular, or cross-package dependency declarations

repairs.name: ModuleRelocationOperator
repairs.description: Relocates orphaned or misplaced modules to their canonical package directory

repairs.name: NamespaceDisambiguatorOperator
repairs.description: Resolves namespace shadow conflicts by renaming lower-priority conflicting modules
